title: You Will Never Find The Exit
cta: Follow for the questions that don't let you sleep.

captions.text: If we live in a simulation, you will never find the exit.
Every test you run is part of the program.
The ruler that measures the wall is made of the same code as the wall.
The cage is not locked — it has no door at all.
But here is what changes everything.
If this is the only reality you can reach, and it stays consistent,
The substrate never cheapened a single moment of it.
